name: Seabridge Gold Inc.
description: Seabridge Gold Inc. is a leading Canadian resource company focused on the acquisition and development of major gold deposits. The company's primary assets include the 100%-owned KSM project and the Iskut project, both located in British Columbia's Golden Triangle, as well as the Courageous Lake project in the Northwest Territories. Seabridge is distinguished by its strategy of maximizing gold ounces per share, holding one of the world's largest portfolios of gold resources. The company focuses on advancing its projects through exploration and engineering to create significant value for shareholders while seeking strategic partnerships for mine construction.
